summary: Quote Follow-Up Sequence - P2 Feature: Automated 3-email conversion booster fully verified. Backend: TypeScript compiles, 14/14 pytest tests pass, all sequence endpoints work. Frontend: Dashboard shows 2 active sequences, detail modal displays 3-step flow, all email previews render correctly.
feature_tested: Quote Follow-Up Sequence - automated 3-email conversion booster (Day 3: Gentle Reminder, Day 7: Answer Questions, Day 10: Final Follow-Up)

issues: Console warning: 'The width(-1) and height(-1) of chart should be greater than 0' - Recharts library warning when chart containers have no data (not blocking)

quoteFollowUpEnrollment_model.details: Model exists in schema.prisma with columns: quoteId (unique), currentStep, completed, email1-3SentAt, stoppedAt, stopReason

quotes_ts_triggers.details: quotes.ts imports quoteFollowUpService (line 9), calls enrollInQuoteFollowUp on quote send (line 707), calls stopQuoteFollowUp on accept (line 998) and decline (line 1080)

portal_ts_triggers.details: portal.ts imports stopQuoteFollowUp (line 7), calls it when client sends message (line 443-448)

email_ts_templates.details: email.ts has sendQuoteFollowUpEmail function (line 2406) with 3 step templates: Gentle Reminder, Answer Questions, Final Follow-Up

server_cron.details: server.ts schedules quote follow-up processor every 6 hours (lines 277-285)

dashboard_endpoint.details: Returns 2 sequences including quote-followup with active=true and 3 steps

step1_preview.details: Returns subject 'Following up on your quote' and HTML

step2_preview.details: Returns different email: 'Any questions about your quote?'

step3_preview.details: Returns final follow-up email: 'Quote expires soon'

auth_required.details: All 4 endpoints return 401 without valid auth token

sequences_dashboard_shows_both.details: Dashboard shows 2 sequence cards: Client Onboarding and Quote Follow-Up

both_sequences_active.details: Both cards show 'Active' badge with green styling

quote_followup_card_details.details: Card shows '3 EMAILS OVER 10 DAYS' with Day 3, Day 7, Day 10 steps

details_button_works.details: Click Details opens modal with 3-step sequence flow

pause_button_exists.details: Pause button visible but disabled for quote-followup (as designed)

detail_modal_3_steps.details: Modal shows Step 1 (Gentle Reminder), Step 2 (Answer Questions), Step 3 (Final Follow-Up)

step1_email_preview.details: Preview Email → renders 'Review Your Quote' button, blue gradient styling

step2_email_preview.details: Preview Email → renders 'Any Questions?' with Common Questions list, purple gradient

step3_email_preview.details: Preview Email → renders 'Final Follow-Up' with quote expiration warning, orange gradient, 'Accept Quote Now' CTA

stats_bar.details: Stats bar shows: Total Sequences: 2, Active: 2, Emails This Week: 0, Clients Enrolled: 0

critical_code_review_comments: QuoteFollowUpEnrollment model correctly implemented with unique quoteId constraint
enrollInQuoteFollowUp checks quote status is SENT before enrolling
stopQuoteFollowUp handles 5 reasons: quote_accepted, client_responded, quote_declined, manual_stop, completed
processQuoteFollowUpSequences correctly calculates delays: 3 days for step 1, 4 days after email 1 for step 2, 3 days after email 2 for step 3
Each step verifies quote.status === 'SENT' before sending (prevents emails after accept/decline)
Email templates are well-designed with appropriate CTAs for each stage
Dashboard correctly shows both sequences as active with accurate step information
All data-testid attributes present for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Quote Follow-Up Sequence fully verified: Backend has quoteFollowUpService.ts with enroll/stop/process functions, email.ts has sendQuoteFollowUpEmail with 3 templates, quotes.ts triggers enrollment on send and stops on accept/decline, portal.ts stops on client message. Frontend shows both sequences as Active in dashboard, detail modal displays 3-step flow correctly, all email previews render HTML templates. Cron runs every 6 hours.

feature_summary.quote_followup_sequence: COMPLETE - All 18 verification points passed: Backend service exists with correct functions, triggers in quotes.ts and portal.ts, email templates for 3 steps, cron scheduled, dashboard returns 2 active sequences, frontend displays both cards with Active status, detail modal shows flow, email previews render correctly
